home.subtitle: Live results and race timing for our community triathlon.

hof.title: Hall of Fame
hof.subtitle: All-time records and champions of the Gal-On Triathlon.
hof.searchPlaceholder: Search a name — see every race and result…
hof.place: {place, selectordinal, one {#st} two {#nd} few {#rd} other {#th}} place
hof.medalsNote: Career medals from the individual races (1st / 2nd / 3rd in each year and category).
hof.medalsWithGroupsNote: Includes team podiums — each member of a medal-winning team is credited. Teams whose roster couldn't be split reliably are not counted.
hof.sourceNote: Records compiled from the 2018–2023 result sheets. Spot a mistake? Let the staff know.

results.title: Results
results.name: Name
results.noEntries: No competitors registered in this category yet.
results.hidden: Live results aren't published yet. Check back soon.

stations.title: Timing Stations
stations.subtitle: Choose the station you're working at.
stations.checkinDesc: Mark competitors arrived at the gathering area
stations.startDesc: Start the clock for a heat

stationStart.title: Start Station
stationStart.rosterHint: Untick anyone who isn't here. Tap a name to fix a last-minute replacement.
stationStart.notActiveYet: The competition hasn't been activated yet. Check back once the admin starts it.

stationStamp.title: Stamp Times
stationStamp.noEntries: No competitors waiting at this station.
stationStamp.manualHint: Type the arrival time from the clock (HH:MM:SS).

manage.confirmDeleteEntry: Remove this competitor/team and all their times?
manage.confirmDeleteHeat: Delete this heat and all its entries? This cannot be undone.
manage.generateScheduleConfirm: Form teams, create heats, and generate the schedule from all checked-in registrants? Safe to re-run for anyone not yet placed.
manage.activateConfirm: Activate the competition? Timing stations go live for all timekeepers.
manage.unassignedNone: Everyone checked-in has been placed into a team or heat.
manage.unassignedHint: Add these people to an existing team manually below, or check in more people and re-run the lottery.

register.title: Race Registration
register.name: Full name
register.legsPrompt: Which leg(s) are you willing to do? (choose one or more)
register.success: You're registered! See you at the event.
register.errorInvalid: Please check your details and try again.
register.errorNoLeg: Please choose at least one leg for a relay team.
register.chooseAvailable: Put me in a group (I'm available)
register.chooseHasGroup: I have a group (I'll pick the members)
register.groupModeJoin: Join a group a teammate already started
register.assignRoles: Assign the three legs. Take at least one yourself.
register.createGroupHint: For each leg, pick yourself, choose someone already registered as available, name a teammate to register them right now, or set it to "will be added later".
register.joinPrompt: Choose a group and the leg you'll do.
register.noOpenGroups: No open groups yet — start a new one above.
register.errorRolesIncomplete: Please set each leg to a person or to "will be added later".
register.errorRolesInvalid: The same person can't do all three legs.
register.errorCaptainRole: Please take at least one leg yourself.
register.errorJoinLeg: Please choose a group and which leg you'll do.
register.errorJoinTaken: That leg was just taken. Please pick another group or leg.
register.errorBadTeammate: One of the teammates is no longer available. Please re-pick.

testdata.title: QC / Test Data
testdata.hint: For pre-launch testing only. Generate fake competitors, then reset before opening real registration.
testdata.resetConfirm: Delete ALL registrants, groups, heats and times? This cannot be undone.
testdata.resetResultsConfirm: Clear all heats, the schedule and every timing stamp, but KEEP the registered competitors, their teams and check-ins? You can then generate the schedule and start again.
testdata.resetResultsDone: Results and timing cleared — competitors kept.

schedule.title: Race Schedule
schedule.notGenerated: The schedule hasn't been published yet.

competitors.title: Registered Competitors
competitors.subtitle: Everyone signed up for this year's triathlon.
